org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor

## Class RecordWiseFileCompactor<IN>

  * [java.lang.Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor.RecordWiseFileCompactor<IN>

  * All Implemented Interfaces:
    [Serializable](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/io/Serializable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io"), [FileCompactor](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor")

* * *




        [@PublicEvolving](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public class RecordWiseFileCompactor<IN>
        extends [Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        implements [FileCompactor](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor")

A [`FileCompactor`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/FileCompactor.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor") implementation that reads input files with a [`RecordWiseFileCompactor.Reader`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/RecordWiseFileCompactor.Reader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor") and writes with a [`RecordWiseFileCompactor.Writer`](<../../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/compactor/RecordWiseFileCompactor.Writer.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor").

See Also:
    [Serialized Form](<../../../../../../../serialized-form.html#org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.compactor.RecordWiseFileCompactor>)
